@loopCount = local_unnamed_addr global i32 0, align 4

define dso_local noundef i32 @main() local_unnamed_addr #1 {

  tail call void @_sysy_starttime(i32 noundef 10016) #3

  %cmp18 = icmp sgt i32 %0, 0

  %rem = srem i32 %add6, 536854529
  %add7 = add nuw nsw i32 %i.020, 1
  %indvars.iv.next = add i32 %indvars.iv, 60
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i32 %add7, %0
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %while.end8, label %while.cond1.preheader, !llvm.loop !6

while.end8:                                       ; preds = %while.cond1.preheader, %entry
  %sum.0.lcssa = phi i32 [ 0, %entry ], [ %rem, %while.cond1.preheader ]
  tail call void @_sysy_stoptime(i32 noundef 10031) #3
